Forward to Agency Management Team.

 

Please kindly confirm whether we need to create a new office code for BELAWAN (IDBLW), if yes, please provide necessary informations for our creation (the attachment is for your reference).

In addition, please also help to check and confirm the user ID and his/her authorities requested in below.

Thanks & Best Regards!

Catherine KANG/康秀英
Business Analysis Manager
